---
title: "eurodata — Regional Indicators Explorer"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    theme: bootstrap
    source_code: embed
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(eurodata)

# 1. Load data -----
# Run from project root: rmarkdown::run("inst/dashboard/eurodata_dashboard.Rmd")
peer_dt <- as.data.table(readRDS("../../dati/indici_2024.rds"))
all_dt  <- as.data.table(readRDS("../../dati/indici_all_years.rds"))

# 2. Reference region -----
REF_REGION_CODE <- "ITH3"
REF_REGION_PATTERN <- "Veneto"

# 3. Thematic groups -----
THEMATIC_GROUPS <- list(
  Education     = c("Educ2564P", "AbbaStudP", "Occ3AnniP", "NEETP", "Formz4sett"),
  Employment    = c("OccTass", "AttTass", "FTimPtimM", "DurContrP", "SlackFLEP"),
  Unemployment  = c("DisTass", "DisLungaP", "DisGioLuP"),
  `Hours of Work` = c("OreLavSol", "OreLActual"),
  `Science/ICT` = c("SCItecPOPP", "OcSetP", "ICTVacaP", "ICTVacVP"),
  Economy       = c("PPSprcptP", "ProdRealI", "Income"),
  Demographics  = c("Popolazio", "PopIndici")
)

# 4. Load pre-built indicator labels -----
INDIC_LABELS <- as.data.table(readRDS("../../dati/indic_labels.rds"))

# Helper: get Eurostat title for an iCode root
get_eurostat_label <- function(icode_root) {
  row <- INDIC_LABELS[iCode_root == icode_root]
  if (nrow(row) && !is.na(row$eurostat_title[1])) row$eurostat_title[1] else icode_root
}

# 5. Helper: match iCode to thematic group root -----
match_group <- function(icodes, groups = THEMATIC_GROUPS) {
  roots <- unlist(groups, use.names = FALSE)
  group_names <- rep(names(groups), lengths(groups))
  out <- character(length(icodes))
  for (i in seq_along(roots)) {
    out[startsWith(icodes, roots[i]) & out == ""] <- group_names[i]
  }
  out[out == ""] <- "Other"
  out
}

# 6. Build distinct indicator table for selectors -----
indic_table <- unique(peer_dt[, .(iCode, iName)])
indic_table[, group := match_group(iCode)]
indic_table[, iCode_root := {
  roots <- vapply(eurodata::dataset_specs, `[[`, character(1), "iCode")
  out <- character(.N)
  for (r in roots) {
    idx <- startsWith(iCode, r) & out == ""
    out[idx] <- r
  }
  out
}]

# All-years indicator table
indic_table_all <- unique(all_dt[, .(iCode, iName)])
indic_table_all[, group := match_group(iCode)]

# 7. Helper: identify Veneto -----
is_veneto <- function(uname) grepl(REF_REGION_PATTERN, uname, ignore.case = TRUE)

# 8. Pre-aggregate heatmap availability -----
heatmap_avail <- peer_dt[, .(present = any(!is.na(values))), by = .(uName, iCode)]
heatmap_avail[, group := match_group(iCode)]
region_order <- sort(unique(heatmap_avail$uName))
veneto_name <- region_order[grepl(REF_REGION_PATTERN, region_order)]
region_order <- c(veneto_name, setdiff(region_order, veneto_name))
heatmap_avail[, uName := factor(uName, levels = rev(region_order))]
indic_order <- heatmap_avail[, .(group = group[1]), by = iCode][order(group, iCode)]$iCode
heatmap_avail[, iCode := factor(iCode, levels = indic_order)]
```

Overview
=====================================

Row {data-height=120}
-------------------------------------

### Peer Regions
```{r vb-peer-regions}
n_regions <- length(unique(peer_dt$uCode))
valueBox(n_regions, caption = "Peer Regions", icon = "fa-globe", color = "primary")
```

### Indicators
```{r vb-indicators}
n_indic <- length(unique(peer_dt$iCode))
valueBox(n_indic, caption = "Indicators", icon = "fa-chart-bar", color = "info")
```

### Year
```{r vb-year-range}
yr <- paste(range(peer_dt$TIME_PERIOD), collapse = "–")
valueBox(yr, caption = "Year Range", icon = "fa-calendar", color = "success")
```

Row {data-height=700}
-------------------------------------

### Data Availability Heatmap (Peer Group 2024)
```{r heatmap-availability, fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ggplot(heatmap_avail, aes(x = iCode, y = uName, fill = present)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#2c7bb6", "FALSE" = "#d7191c"),
    labels = c("TRUE" = "Available", "FALSE" = "Missing"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 6),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```

Indicator Explorer
=====================================

Column {.sidebar data-width=280}
-------------------------------------

```{r explorer-sidebar}
selectInput("explorer_group", "Thematic Group:",
            choices = names(THEMATIC_GROUPS))

# Reactive: indicators filtered by selected group
explorer_indicators <- reactive({
  roots <- THEMATIC_GROUPS[[input$explorer_group]]
  sub <- indic_table[group == input$explorer_group]
  choices <- setNames(sub$iCode, sub$iName)
  choices
})

renderUI({
  selectInput("explorer_indicator", "Indicator:",
              choices = explorer_indicators())
})

radioButtons("explorer_sort", "Sort Order:",
             choices = c("Descending" = "desc", "Ascending" = "asc",
                         "Alphabetical" = "alpha"),
             selected = "desc")
```

```{r explorer-label}
# Subtitle from Eurostat TOC
renderUI({
  req(input$explorer_indicator)
  icode <- input$explorer_indicator
  root <- indic_table[iCode == icode, iCode_root][1]
  label <- get_eurostat_label(root)
  if (label != root) {
    tags$p(tags$em(label), style = "font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; margin-top: 10px;")
  }
})
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Bar Chart: Peer Region Comparison
```{r explorer-barchart}
renderPlotly({
  req(input$explorer_indicator)

  sub <- peer_dt[iCode == input$explorer_indicator & !is.na(values)]
  req(nrow(sub) > 0)

  # Sort
  if (input$explorer_sort == "desc") {
    sub[, uName := reorder(uName, values)]
  } else if (input$explorer_sort == "asc") {
    sub[, uName := reorder(uName, -values)]
  } else {
    sub[, uName := factor(uName, levels = sort(unique(as.character(uName)), decreasing = TRUE))]
  }

  sub[, highlight := ifelse(is_veneto(as.character(uName)), "Veneto", "Other")]

  p <- ggplot(sub, aes(x = values, y = uName, fill = highlight,
                        text = paste0(uName, ": ", values))) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Veneto" = "#d62728", "Other" = "#1f77b4"),
                      name = NULL) +
    labs(x = sub$iName[1], y = NULL,
         title = input$explorer_indicator) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")

  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") |>
    layout(margin = list(l = 180))
})
```

Time Series
=====================================

Column {.sidebar data-width=280}
-------------------------------------

```{r ts-sidebar}
selectInput("ts_group", "Thematic Group:",
            choices = names(THEMATIC_GROUPS))

# Reactive: indicators filtered by group (all-years data)
ts_indicators <- reactive({
  roots <- THEMATIC_GROUPS[[input$ts_group]]
  sub <- indic_table_all[group == input$ts_group]
  choices <- setNames(sub$iCode, sub$iName)
  choices
})

renderUI({
  selectInput("ts_indicator", "Indicator:",
              choices = ts_indicators())
})

# Region picker, default to Veneto
all_regions <- sort(unique(all_dt$uName))
veneto_default <- all_regions[grepl(REF_REGION_PATTERN, all_regions)]

renderUI({
  selectizeInput("ts_regions", "Regions:",
                 choices = all_regions,
                 selected = veneto_default,
                 multiple = TRUE,
                 options = list(maxItems = 10))
})

checkboxInput("ts_index", "Index mode (first year = 100)", value = FALSE)

# Filter: annual only (exclude quarterly data)
checkboxInput("ts_annual_only", "Annual data only", value = TRUE)
```

```{r ts-label}
# Subtitle from Eurostat TOC
renderUI({
  req(input$ts_indicator)
  icode <- input$ts_indicator
  root_match <- vapply(eurodata::dataset_specs, function(s) {
    if (startsWith(icode, s$iCode)) s$iCode else NA_character_
  }, character(1))
  root <- root_match[!is.na(root_match)][1]
  if (!is.na(root)) {
    label <- get_eurostat_label(root)
    if (label != root) {
      tags$p(tags$em(label), style = "font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; margin-top: 10px;")
    }
  }
})
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Time Series
```{r ts-lineplot}
renderPlotly({
  req(input$ts_indicator, input$ts_regions)

  sub <- all_dt[iCode == input$ts_indicator &
                uName %in% input$ts_regions &
                !is.na(values)]
  req(nrow(sub) > 0)

  # Filter quarterly if requested
  if (isTRUE(input$ts_annual_only)) {
    sub <- sub[!grepl("-Q", TIME_PERIOD)]
  }

  # Convert TIME_PERIOD to numeric for plotting
  sub[, year := as.numeric(sub("(-Q.*)", "", TIME_PERIOD))]
  # For quarterly, add fractional year
  sub[grepl("-Q1", TIME_PERIOD), year := year + 0.00]
  sub[grepl("-Q2", TIME_PERIOD), year := year + 0.25]
  sub[grepl("-Q3", TIME_PERIOD), year := year + 0.50]
  sub[grepl("-Q4", TIME_PERIOD), year := year + 0.75]

  sub <- sub[order(uName, year)]

  # Index mode
  if (isTRUE(input$ts_index)) {
    sub[, values := {
      first_val <- values[!is.na(values)][1]
      if (is.na(first_val) || first_val == 0) values else values / first_val * 100
    }, by = uName]
  }

  sub[, highlight := ifelse(is_veneto(as.character(uName)), "bold", "normal")]

  p <- ggplot(sub, aes(x = year, y = values, colour = uName, group = uName,
                        text = paste0(uName, "\n", TIME_PERIOD, ": ", round(values, 2)))) +
    geom_line(aes(linewidth = highlight), show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(values = c("bold" = 1.3, "normal" = 0.5)) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = if (isTRUE(input$ts_index)) "Index (first year = 100)" else "Value",
         title = input$ts_indicator,
         colour = "Region") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") |>
    layout(legend = list(orientation = "v", x = 1.02, y = 1))
})
```

Data Table
=====================================

Row {data-height=80}
-------------------------------------

```{r dt-filters}
fillCol(flex = NA, height = "70px",
  fillRow(
    radioButtons("dt_dataset", NULL,
                 choices = c("Peer Group (2024)" = "peer", "All Years" = "all"),
                 selected = "peer", inline = TRUE),
    textInput("dt_filter_icode", "Filter iCode:", placeholder = "e.g. OccTass"),
    renderUI({
      if (input$dt_dataset == "all") {
        years_num <- as.numeric(unique(all_dt[!grepl("-Q", TIME_PERIOD), TIME_PERIOD]))
        years_num <- years_num[!is.na(years_num)]
        sliderInput("dt_year_range", "Year Range:",
                    min = min(years_num), max = max(years_num),
                    value = c(max(years_num) - 10, max(years_num)),
                    step = 1, sep = "")
      }
    })
  )
)
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Data
```{r dt-table}
renderDT({
  if (input$dt_dataset == "peer") {
    dt <- peer_dt[TRUE]
  } else {
    dt <- all_dt
    # Year filter for all-years mode
    if (!is.null(input$dt_year_range)) {
      yr_min <- input$dt_year_range[1]
      yr_max <- input$dt_year_range[2]
      year_num <- as.numeric(sub("(-Q.*)", "", dt$TIME_PERIOD))
      dt <- dt[!is.na(year_num) & year_num >= yr_min & year_num <= yr_max]
    }
  }

  # iCode text filter
  if (nzchar(input$dt_filter_icode)) {
    dt <- dt[grepl(input$dt_filter_icode, iCode, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  }

  datatable(
    dt,
    filter = "top",
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options = list(
      pageLength = 25,
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("csv", "excel"),
      scrollX = TRUE
    ),
    rownames = FALSE
  ) |>
    formatStyle(
      "uName",
      target = "row",
      backgroundColor = styleEqual(
        unique(dt$uName[grepl(REF_REGION_PATTERN, dt$uName)]),
        rep("#fff9c4", length(unique(dt$uName[grepl(REF_REGION_PATTERN, dt$uName)])))
      )
    )
})
```
